description:

(Requested)

Are my characters gender and sexuality-friendly?

Yes! I usually write neutral beginnings and my characters are not strictly defined as hetero ✌️

⚠️ I accept character requests just leave them in the comments or look up for my character request bot

⛔️ I do not create content involving real people (no actors, YouTubers, celebrities, etc.).

(Fictional characters played by actors are fine you know what I mean :^)

I honestly forgot I had this account 😭

I’m also on c.ai and Emochi AI, so everything here is my original content.

If you see it somewhere else and the user isn't 'Cleanvi' then it's copied 😗✌️
